name: orch
description: SDD+TDD workflow for OpenCode — Spec-Driven Development + Test-Driven Development

workflow.description: Unified entry point: auto-orchestrates the full 10-stage workflow

spec.description: Requirement analysis and BDD spec generation (WHEN-THEN format)

test-design.description: Convert TEST-VERIFY into test specs, fixtures, and templates

contract.description: API contract definition and 5-dimension review (fullstack only)

task.description: Break design into actionable code-level tasks

execute.description: TDD implementation with git-worktree isolation and two-stage review

exception.description: Exception pattern scanning and code generation (backend/fullstack)

archive.description: Merge validated specs into enterprise spec library

continuous-learning.description: Knowledge compounding: pattern recognition, distillation, and adaptation

scripts.description: Tool-first strategy: use scripts for file operations over direct reads
